Title: PX_ValidateTestExecutionComplete
Step Action: Log into Jira and navigate to the client-specific backlog
Locate the Test Execution & Validation ticket for this tenant
Step Expected Result: Ticket exists with title format: Test Execution & Validation - REF[Tenant Name]

Step Action: Verify ticket description includes links to Testing folder
column5: All required documentation links are present and accessible

Step Action: Confirm the ticket is assigned to the SQA Team
Step Expected Result: Ticket assigned to designated SQA team members

Step Action: Review SQA execution status: verify all test phases have been executed and covered
Step Expected Result: Test execution tracking shows all playbook phases tested

Step Action: Confirm test results have been documented and recorded
Step Expected Result: Test results document exists with detailed findings per phase

Step Action: Verify that all manual test steps have been completed
Step Expected Result: Test case execution checklist shows 100% completion
Postman) have been executed and passed
column4: Automation test reports show successful execution

Title: PX_ValidateCriticalDefectsResolved
Step Action: Review Jira defect log for all issues found during test execution
Step Expected Result: Defect tracking shows all issues logged

Step Action: Filter defects by severity and confirm all Blocker defects have been resolved
Step Expected Result: Blocker defects marked as resolved or closed

Step Action: Verify all High-priority defects have been resolved before PROD validation
Confirm Medium and Low-priority defects have documented resolution or deferral decisions
Step Expected Result: All defect records include resolution status

Step Action: Review CloudWatch logs from all application deployments for any unresolved critical errors
Step Expected Result: Logs reviewed and show no unresolved critical errors

Step Action: Confirm sign-off from all phase owners that their respective phases passed validation
Obtain final Project Manager sign-off that onboarding is complete and ready for go-live
Step Expected Result: Project Manager sign-off documented on Jira ticket
